wafv2.webacl.defaultaction.CfnAbout: In a `WebACL`, this is the action that you want AWS WAF to perform when a web request doesn't match any of the rules in the `WebACL`. The default action must be a terminating action, so count is not allowed.

wafv2.webacl.defaultaction.Allow.Description: Specifies that AWS WAF should allow requests by default.

wafv2.webacl.defaultaction.Block.Description: Specifies that AWS WAF should block requests by default.
